title: selaginella sericea
intro: Selaginella sericea, also known as the silky spikemoss or silky club moss, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Selaginella sericea include its ability to improve respiratory health, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with the herbal preparation often used to treat various health conditions, including bronchitis, coughs, and colds.
